payload.answer: Admin SQL select-only mode permits read-only SELECT statements such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`. Mutating statements such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards` are denied.

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes an operational/debug policy fixture rather than a durable user memory.

details: Preserved the distinction that SELECT is allowed and DELETE is denied.
No durable memory card was created.
